name: file_write
description: Write a UTF-8 text file. Sandboxed to ~/.juno/skill-data/. By default refuses to overwrite an existing file unless `overwrite: true` is set.
when_to_use: User asks you to save, draft, write down, or note something — and you have the content ready.
when_not_to_use: Before you have the actual content. Plan the content first; only call this when you'd be writing the final bytes.

path.description: Absolute path or path relative to the sandbox.

overwrite.description: If false (default), refuses when the file already exists.
